positive: A stylized illustration of a celestial mountain range, featuring peaks made of glowing quartz and obsidian, intersected by a nebula river. The style is highly detailed sacred geometry mixed with ethereal bioluminescent flora, rendered in deep indigo, cosmic violet, brilliant cyan, and contrasting gold accents. The composition is symmetrical and centered, ideal for repeat patterning. Minimal shading, strong silhouettes, clean lines, high contrast, and a perfect, print-ready graphic aesthetic. Suitable for a modern, whimsical apparel print.
